Class MethodContributor<M extends QueryMethod>

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.data.repository.aot.generate.MethodContributor<M>
Type Parameters:
M - query method type.
public abstract class MethodContributor<M extends QueryMethod> extends Object
Strategy for contributing AOT repository methods by looking introspecting query methods.
Since:
4.0
Author:
Mark Paluch

  • Nested Class Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static interface 
    MethodContributor.QueryMethodContributorBuilder<M extends QueryMethod>
    Builder for a query method contributor.
    static interface 
    MethodContributor.QueryMethodMetadataContributorBuilder<M extends QueryMethod>
    Initial builder for a query method contributor.
    static interface 
    MethodContributor.RepositoryMethodContribution
    AOT contribution from a AotRepositoryMethodBuilder used to contribute a repository query method body.
    static interface 
    MethodContributor.RepositoryMethodCustomizer
    Customizer for a contributed AOT repository query method.

    • forQueryMethod

      public static <M extends QueryMethod> MethodContributor.QueryMethodMetadataContributorBuilder<M> forQueryMethod(M queryMethod)
      Creates a new builder to build a MethodContributor.
      Type Parameters:
      M - query method type.
      Parameters:
      queryMethod - the query method to be used.
      Returns:
      the new builder.

      public boolean contributesMethodSpec()
